mapper.sql: t.id, t.payment_id, t.payment_no, t.order_id, t.payment_stage, t.payment_channel, t.payment_amount, t.payment_status, t.initiator_role, t.initiator_id, t.authorized_flag, t.authorized_proof_type, t.external_trade_no, t.pay_time, t.fail_reason, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.modify_time, t.modify_by, t.row_version, t.row_valid
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vso_payment t WHERE t.order_id = #{orderId} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM vso_payment t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vso_payment t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
AND t.order_id = #{params.orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vso_payment ( payment_id, payment_no, order_id, payment_stage, payment_channel, payment_amount, payment_status, initiator_role, initiator_id, authorized_flag, authorized_proof_type, external_trade_no, pay_time, fail_reason, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{paymentId}, #{paymentNo}, #{orderId}, #{paymentStage}, #{paymentChannel}, #{paymentAmount}, #{paymentStatus}, #{initiatorRole}, #{initiatorId}, #{authorizedFlag}, #{authorizedProofType}, #{externalTradeNo}, #{payTime}, #{failReason}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO vso_payment ( payment_id, payment_no, order_id, payment_stage, payment_channel, payment_amount, payment_status, initiator_role, initiator_id, authorized_flag, authorized_proof_type, external_trade_no, pay_time, fail_reason, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.paymentId}, #{item.paymentNo}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.paymentStage}, #{item.paymentChannel}, #{item.paymentAmount}, #{item.paymentStatus}, #{item.initiatorRole}, #{item.initiatorId}, #{item.authorizedFlag}, #{item.authorizedProofType}, #{item.externalTradeNo}, #{item.payTime}, #{item.failReason}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE vso_payment t SET
t.payment_status = #{paymentStatus},
t.external_trade_no = #{externalTradeNo},
t.pay_time = #{payTime},
t.fail_reason = #{failReason},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE t.id = #{id}
UPDATE vso_payment t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
